name: tenant-id-validator
description: Validates and populates tenant_id across all modules using TenantScope trait
author: Opencode

parameters.name: fix
parameters.description: If set to true, populates missing tenant_id values

features.name: Validate TenantScope Tables
features.description: Validates all tables using TenantScope trait and reports on tenant_id population status

features.name: Generate Statistics
features.description: Provides comprehensive statistics on tenant_id population across all tables

features.name: Populate Missing tenant_id
features.description: Automatically assigns tenant_id=1 to all records missing tenant_id

features.name: Detailed Reports
features.description: Generates detailed reports with counts, percentages, and recommendations

how-to-use: Run the skill to validate tenant_id population:

examples.title: Checking Tenant ID Status
examples.description: Validates and shows tenant_id population across all tables
examples.output:
=== TABLES WITH TENANT SCOPE ===
productos: ✅ OK (78.5% sin tenant_id)
categorias: ✅ OK (0% sin tenant_id)
clientes: ✅ OK (0% sin tenant_id)
...

=== SUMMARY ===
Total tables: 38
Tables with tenant_id: 38
Tables without tenant_id: 0
Total records with tenant_id: 10,450
Total records without tenant_id: 2,780

examples.title: Fixing Missing Tenant IDs
examples.description: Populates tenant_id=1 for all records missing it
examples.output:
=== POPULATING MISSING TENANT_ID ===
  ✓ productos: asignados 780 tenant_id = 1
  ✓ clientes: asignados 450 tenant_id = 1
  ✓ ventas: asignados 320 tenant_id = 1
  ✓ ...

✓ Total registros actualizados: 1,550

=== FINAL STATISTICS ===
Total tables processed: 38
Total records in database: 13,230
Records with valid tenant_id: 11,880
Records without tenant_id: 0

✅ All records have tenant_id assigned.

troubleshooting.solution: Add the tenant_id column to the table or check if the model uses TenantScope trait
Ensure database permissions are correct and run with proper database user

troubleshooting.problem: Large number of records taking too long
troubleshooting.solution: Consider running the command with a batch limit or during off-peak hours
